overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban environment during golden hour. The player navigates from a gritty backstreet under an overpass, through an intersection with moderate traffic, past a neon-lit Brain Wash store, and into a covered pedestrian walkway leading to a bustling commercial district with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty urban backstreet under concrete overpass with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past abandoned vehicles and concrete barriers under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
rusted green pickup truck with open doors parked on the street
concrete barrier with red and white stripes and graffiti reading CHAOS
weathered concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti tags
metal water tank on rooftop with visible rust and piping
futuristic high-rise towers visible in the hazy distance beyond the overpass
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a gritty urban backstreet beneath a massive concrete overpass. An abandoned green truck sits in the middle of the road next to red and white barricades. The area is sparsely populated with scattered pedestrians, while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the golden-hour haze beyond the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection under overpass with moderate traffic

events.description: turns left at the intersection to walk along the main road under the overpass
white sedan and other vehicles drive past on the road

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking along the roadside with traffic passing by

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past the player on the road
person in bright red pants crossing the street

entered.detail: purple and orange neon sign for Brain Wash store on building facade
wooden electrical pole with multiple transformers and wires

segments.scene_description: The player turns left at the intersection, moving from the enclosed backstreet into a wider road under the overpass. Vehicles including a white sedan drive past on the asphalt, while a pedestrian in red pants crosses ahead. The Brain Wash store's neon sign becomes visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill commercial street with neon storefronts approaching covered walkway

events.description: passes Brain Wash store and enters the covered pedestrian walkway under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking uphill alongside the road passing the Brain Wash storefront with neon signage

notable_agents.action: white car driving uphill alongside the player

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation rising beside the street
spinning green holographic advertisement projection near the storefront
dark entrance to covered pedestrian walkway under the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the hill past the Brain Wash store, its purple neon sign glowing against the warm sunset light. The rocky hillside rises on the left while cars drive uphill alongside. The player approaches and enters a covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from open sky to the shadowed underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to busy commercial district

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into open busy commercial street with dense crowds
crowd density increases significantly entering the bustling market area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway into a bustling commercial street with increasing pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person in hat and long coat walking ahead of the player into the crowd
tan sedan driving along the busy commercial street

entered.detail: massive painted mural of a face on corrugated metal wall under the overpass
large electronic advertising screen displaying animated content above the street
row of parked vehicles along the right side of the commercial street

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass, passing a striking large face mural on the right wall. Emerging from the shadows, the scene opens into a bustling commercial district with moderate crowds and parked cars lining the street. Digital billboards glow above as the crowd density increases, with pedestrians moving in opposing directions through the busy urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, enclosed backstreet into a bustling, neon-lit commercial district during the golden hour. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past an abandoned green truck and red barricades toward a distant skyline shrouded in haze. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the enclosed space opens into a wider road with passing traffic before ascending a rocky hillside past the glowing purple neon sign of a Brain Wash store. The scene then shifts from the warm sunset light into the shadows of a covered pedestrian walkway, passing a large face mural on the right wall. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass into a crowded urban corridor filled with digital billboards, parked cars, and a dense flow of pedestrians.
